basics.name: Nguyen Hong Phuc
basics.label: BSc ECE Student & AI Researcher
basics.summary: Electrical and Computer Engineering student at VinUniversity specializing in AI, machine learning, and signal processing. Research interests include wireless communications, semantic communication, energy harvesting, and embedded AI systems.

work.name: Intelligence, Computing and Communication Lab (ICCL), VinUniversity
work.summary: Supervised by Assoc. Prof. Nguyen Van Dinh.
highlights: Investigated Open RAN architecture, 5G networks, and Task-Oriented Semantic Communication.
Developed multi-modality AI models for smart aquaculture (computer vision, fish tracking, underwater size estimation, image segmentation).
Exploring Diffusion Models for enhanced data generation and signal processing applications.

work.name: FPT Software
highlights: Deployed quantized LLMs on Raspberry Pi to create a conversational conservation chatbot.
Implemented A* pathfinding algorithms for autonomous navigation optimization.
Engineered a full-stack solution (Frontend/Backend) for real-time shopper tracking and route optimization.

work.name: WorldQuant
highlights: Developed predictive mathematical models (Alphas) to forecast financial instrument price movements.
Utilized statistical analysis and historical data to optimize trading signals.

education.institution: Bac Ninh High School for the Gifted

awards.title: Finalist — 2025 Quantum Global Industry Challenge (Connected DMV)
Silver Medal — The University Physics Competition 2024
2nd Prize — National Physics Olympiad
awards.awarder: Ministry of Education and Training, Vietnam

awards.title: 5th Place Worldwide — Thomas Jefferson Physics Olympiad

publications.name: Energy-Aware Resource Allocation for Energy Harvesting Powered Wireless Sensor Nodes
publications.summary: Introduced a novel energy-aware resource allocation framework enabling the asynchronous accumulate-then-transmit protocol for EH-powered WSNs. Jointly optimizes power allocation and EH time fraction to maximize long-term throughput.

publications.name: A Digital Healthcare Platform for Cardiovascular Disease Management
publications.summary: Architecture, technology integration, and deployment of a digital healthcare platform in Vietnam.

publications.name: Low-Cost Triboelectric Nanogenerator for Wind Energy Harvesting in Urban Areas
publications.summary: Design and evaluation of a low-cost TENG for sustainable wind energy harvesting in urban environments.

publications.name: Sustainable Smart Mariculture System: IoT-Based Water Quality Monitoring
publications.summary: IoT-based water quality monitoring and pollution reduction system for smart aquaculture.

projects.name: Smart Aquaculture System (AquaSense / AquaSC)
projects.summary: IoT and AI system for sustainable resource management in aquaculture. Integrates computer vision, water quality sensors, and semantic communication.

projects.name: WinCart
projects.summary: AI-powered smart shopping assistant enabling hands-free experiences with real-time positioning via ML on Silicon Labs hardware.

projects.name: Neural Network From Scratch
projects.summary: Implemented a CNN in C++ and a feedforward NN in C for MNIST classification without external ML libraries.
